clo-Sports Team

Team

Alen Narsüz

Sport Specialist

[email protected]

+90 (212) 533 65 32 – 4504

She graduated from Marmara University School of Physical Education and Sports, Department of Coaching. Between 1990 and 2000, he played volleyball professionally for Eczacıbaşı, Beşiktaş, Marmara College, Altınyurt and Şişli sports clubs. He has 6 Turkish Championships on club basis. He has coached Eczacıbaşı, Es Spor, Şişli, Istanbul Metropolitan Municipality teams. He has the highest 5th Level Volleyball Coaching and International Volleyball Coaching certificates. He is the coach of Men’s and Women’s Volleyball Teams at our university.

Translated with DeepL.com (free version)

Aysel Damar

Sport Specialist

[email protected]

+90 (212) 533 65 32 – 4502

He graduated from Çukurova University, Department of Physical Education Teaching. She completed her master’s degree in Curriculum and Instruction at Yıldız Technical University. He completed the Sports Law & Management and Sports Communication Certificate Programs at Kadir Has University. Damar, who grew up in the Botaş Sports sub-structure, has Turkish Championships and degrees in various categories. She worked as Hatay Dörtyol Women’s Basketball Team, Anadolu S.K Team, UPS S.K Star Team Coach and Sakarya University 2nd League Women’s Basketball Team Coach. In 2010, she won the Social Responsibility Project Award with the Basketball School she organized at Kadir Has University. She was appointed as U16 Star Girls National Team Manager in 2013-2014, 2014-2015 and U20 U20 U20 Girls National Team Manager in 2015-2016. He is a member of the basketball technical committee of the Turkish University Sports Federation and a member of the board of directors of the Istanbul Provincial Coordination Board. He coaches Basketball Women – Men Teams, Basketball 3×3 Women – Men Teams and Korfball Team at our university.

Tunç Kip

Sport Specialist

[email protected]

+90 (212) 533 65 32 – 4505

He graduated from Haliç University Besyo, Sports Management. He played professional football between 1999 and 2007. He grew up in Beşiktaş infrastructure and worked professionally in Beşiktaş, Göztepe, Akçaabatsebatspor, Hazar Lankeran (Azerbaijan), Elazığspor, Türktelekom Spor, Erzincan Spor. He played 16 times for the youth national team and 13 times for the senior national team. Tunç Kip, who has a Uefa B coaching license, has been coaching Kadir Has University Football and Futsal Team since 2012.

Burkay Günay

Periodic Club Advisor (Rowing Team Coach)

[email protected]

+90 (212) 533 65 32 –

He graduated from Haliç University Besyo, Sports Management. He played professional football between 1999 and 2007. He grew up in Beşiktaş infrastructure and worked professionally in Beşiktaş, Göztepe, Akçaabatsebatspor, Hazar Lankeran (Azerbaijan), Elazığspor, Türktelekom Spor, Erzincan Spor. He played 16 times for the youth national team and 13 times for the senior national team. Tunç Kip, who has a Uefa B coaching license, has been coaching Kadir Has University Football and Futsal Team since 2012.

Orkun Oktay

Sports Assistant Specialist

[email protected]

+90 (212) 533 65 32 – 4503

He graduated from Anadolu University, Department of Management and Organization, Sports Management Program. He worked as a Fitness Coach, Sports Center and Fitness Coordinator at Majestik Fitness Center, Sportika and Moda Fitness Form Club between 1994-2007. He has 2nd Level Fitness Coaching certificate and First Aid certificate. Since 2007, she has been working as a Fitness Coach at Kadir Has University.
